rationale: Markdown intra-repo relative links are now resolved against the artifact's directory, intercepted client-side, looked up via GraphQL by path, and navigated to the matching artifact detail without reload — addressing the prior gap noted on the bead. External links still open in a new tab; other renderers (SVG/DOMPurify, Excalidraw with offline fallback, image, PDF, binary) and the sidecar metadata panel remain intact.

findings.summary: Intra-repo link href is rewritten to '#' with data-ddx-intra-path; navigation depends on JS click handler. No middle-click/open-in-new-tab support, but AC only requires same-tab navigation.
Anchor (#section) links are not specifically handled — they'd be rewritten as relative paths and fail lookup silently rather than scrolling. Not in this bead's AC (covered by US-081a).
